name: L-6 aggregator reports each individual threshold failure separately on a blocked decision per the architecture diagnostic surface
command: printf '%s' '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"org":"cfpb","tier":2}]}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern p.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'evidence_count=1' err.txt && grep -q 'organizations_count=1' err.txt && grep -q 'tier1_count=0' err.txt && echo diagnosed 1>&2
